text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The end of summer camp is around<n>the corner.
Agnes Digital has been<n>training with a frenzy
she's never<n>shown before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I'm melting... I feel likeI'm gonna turn into some kind ofjelly and melt right into the Earth...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've run myself to the limit, Trainer.<n>But now, when
I face off against<n>Opera O, Doto, and the
classic-year<n>cutie...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won't lie to you—I have no<n>confidence
whatsoever! Especially<n>against Opera O and Doto.
They're<n>both so good.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I'm an all-rounder. I just have to<n>pile up all the
different experiences I<n>can...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That is until I get a trick up my sleeve<n>for any
situation! That's all I can do.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
No matter how high she must climb to<n>overcome
her obstacles, Agnes<n>Digital remains unfazed.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Later, at night...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Okay. These are the predicted runners<n>for the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, it's gonna be a<n>three-way
contest of skill.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Three? I don't mean to<n>contradict you, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Don't you mean four-way? OperaO, Doto, me, and the girl who won theNHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait! Have I been dropped?! Is myreputation too low? Am I theweakest link?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tch. Not you. The girl who won the<n>NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
She probably won't get in, so I doubt<n>she'll be in
the race at all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...Why wouldn't she get in?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Cause there's more entrants than<n>slots.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As things stand, she's not getting in<n>unless
someone else pulls out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I bet she'd have what it takes,<n>though. The
media's been hyping her<n>up as "the hope of a
new generation"<n>and saying she could overthrow
the<n>seniors.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But we have to face facts. There's<n>no arguing
with the numbers.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She won't... get to run... just because<n>of the
number of slots...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, the same night, Agnes Digital is<n>listless at
the beach.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Is this really how it is, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She's blazing with potential! She's<n>growing so
much right now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But despite all that, she can't even<n>run? The
goddess of fate is really too<n>cruel.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But then again, the Twinkle Series<n>itself is cruel.
You win and you<n>lose—no one makes it all the way
through with dry eyes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But after you've shed your tears,<n>inspiration
always waits on the other<n>side! That's exactly
why we can look<n>each other in the eyes and
square off<n>the way we do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, can you imagine how sad it would<n>be if we
couldn't even run? There<n>would only be
emptiness after the<n>tears.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
As someone who loves<n>Umamusume... it's
honestly<n>unbearable... Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's like I'm snatching her dream<n>away by
running... If that's the case...
choice_data_list: Don't even think of dropping out.
Don't even think of dropping out.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why not? Though it's my dream to<n>run alongside
Opera O and Doto...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With the way things are right now, I<n>don't feel like
I can win. And if I run<n>feeling like that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I... definitely can't.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: How... How do I accept this situation?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It isn't unlike Agnes Digital to<n>sympathize with
others so much that<n>you'd think their
circumstances were<n>her own.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's because she loves all<n>Umamusume. The tragic
fate of this<n>younger racer has grabbed her by the
ankles and pulled her heart<n>underwater.
